tasks.label: Compila Paletta
args: $candidates = @((Get-Command gfortran -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source -First 1), "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Microsoft\WinGet\Links\gfortran.exe", "C:\Program Files\WinLibs\bin\gfortran.exe", "C:\WinLibs\bin\gfortran.exe") | Where-Object { $_ -and (Test-Path $_) }; if (-not $candidates) { throw 'gfortran non trovato. Installa la toolchain WinLibs oppure aggiorna i percorsi del workspace.' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'bin\Debug' | Out-Null; & $candidates[0] '-g' 'main.f90' 'calcolo_area.f90' 'calcolo_baricentro.f90' '-o' 'bin\Debug\paletta.exe'
